species: we generated a Jurkat PTPN22 knockout (KO) line using clustered regularly interspaced short palindromic repeats (CRISPR)/Cas9-mediated mutagenesis
cell_type: PTPN22 inhibits T cell activation by dephosphorylating substrates involved in proximal T cell receptor (TCR) signaling.
disease_state: an interaction that is impaired by the PTPN22 R620W variant associated with autoimmune disease.
sample_source: primary effector human T cells from peripheral blood
PTPN22 was phosphorylated on Ser751 in PMA/ionomycin and against CD3/CD28-stimulated primary effector human T cells from peripheral blood.
cell_line: we generated a Jurkat PTPN22 knockout (KO) line using clustered regularly interspaced short palindromic repeats (CRISPR)/Cas9-mediated mutagenesis
